title: Beautiful Vanilla
description: This modpack enhances vanilla Minecraft with beautiful shaders, immersive visual details, and essential quality-of-life improvements for a more polished and atmospheric experience.
body:
**Beautiful Vanilla** enhances your Minecraft experience with carefully selected quality-of-life improvements, stunning visuals, and performance optimizations.

**Visual Enhancements:**
- Experience dynamic environments with **Falling Leaves**, atmospheric **3D Ladders and Rails**, and immersive **Better Lanterns**
- Enjoy beautiful shaders with **Complementary Shaders - Unbound** and **Iris Shaders**
- See farther than ever with **Distant Horizons** for breathtaking vistas
- Enhanced world generation with **Tectonic** for more realistic terrain

**Quality of Life Features:**
- **AppleSkin** - See hunger and saturation values
- **Eating Animation** - Smooth eating animations for better immersion
- **Pick Up Notifier** - Know exactly what you're collecting
- **Mouse Tweaks** - Improved inventory management
- **Enchantment Descriptions** - Learn what enchantments do at a glance
- **Durability Tooltip** - Track tool durability easily
- **Smooth Scrolling** - Better menu navigation

**Performance:**
- **Sodium** optimization for significantly improved framerates

**Audio:**
- **AmbientSounds** creates rich, atmospheric soundscapes that bring your world to life

This modpack is perfect for players who want enhanced visuals and convenience features without drastically changing vanilla gameplay. Whether you're building, exploring, or surviving, these improvements make every aspect of Minecraft more enjoyable and polished.
